label: PASS
rationale: The StartSession signature defines Write as boolean, True requests a read-write session, and Opal devices SHALL support True, so SUCCESS is compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: Write False is the specified boolean value for a read-only session, and Opal says False may be supported, so a SUCCESS response is permitted.

label: FAIL
rationale: Write is specified as a boolean and the allowed session selectors are True or False; numeric value 2 is not a boolean, so SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Write is specified as a boolean and -1 is outside the True/False values described for StartSession, so SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Write must be a boolean selecting True for read-write or False for read-only; the string banana is not a boolean, so SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Write is defined as a boolean parameter, with only True and False described as valid session-type values; the string read-write is not compliant with SUCCESS.

label: FAIL
rationale: Write must be a boolean value, not a structured payload such as an array containing True, so the successful StartSession response is not compliant.
